name: Roseate Desire Ishmael (Limbus company)
description:
"Love, blah, blah, blah, blah, blah, blah, blah"

[So, you like this girl that works on some kinda weird bus, you like her a LOT. But unsure how to prove said love, you go with the simplest option, MATERIALISM. Girls like shoes right? And this strange as heck backstreet store is selling the prettiest pair of pink shoes you've seen! Wrapping it up nicely, you scout and wait, finally able to once again see your precious Ishmael! You give her the present, much to her annoyance and moments away from bashing your head in, until she tries them on to shut you up. And then...Ribbons. Oh.]

Rabbit hole ...mi....ku.. AHHHH okay i should calm down..... anyways what do yall think about the new tall hair don ego?

Stra pag:

-Uhhhhh im gonna be BRUTALLY honest, i suck at question like these so just head-cannon or something. and thanks for the small ego boost, i appreciate it.
